success.description: As above, and add 1 recharge token to this action

challenge.description: Effect: You are invisible while this blessing recharges. Anyone who tries to target you is functionally blind (add to the dice pool) and even to target you in the first place an enemy must pass an Observation (Int) vs. Stealth (Ag) check to know you're there. You gain to any check where being invisible would be helpful. If you perform any act of violence, this blessing immediately ends (but does not recharge)

success.description: As above, and immediately perform a free manoeuvre
